title: fragaria chiloensis scouleri
intro: Fragaria chiloensis scouleri, also known as the coastal strawberry or beach strawberry, is a species of strawberry native to the Pacific coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been used to treat wounds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Fragaria chiloensis scouleri are attributed to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Fragaria chiloensis scouleri can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
